---
title: "PS 3"
subtitle: "ARE 212, Spring 2026"
author: "David Cai, Miriam Gold, Ella Moxley, Geoffrey Yip"
date: "6 April 2026"
format: pdf
mainfont: "Palatino"
sansfont: "Palatino"
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

{{< include ps3_q2.qmd >}}

{{< include ps3_q4.qmd >}}

{{< include ps3_q5.qmd >}}
